user_message: Just got this from Laura Schmidt at Treyarch Global -- I need help figuring out competitive positioning. Need this before my 2pm call.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: competitive positioning Discussion - Treyarch Global
Date: 2024-01-23
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Schmidt (Treyarch Global), Raj Mehta (Microsoft), David (Treyarch Global)

[00:02:00] Laura Schmidt (Treyarch Global): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on competitive positioning from our last session.

[00:05:00] David (Treyarch Global): On the competitive positioning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:09:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:12:00] Laura Schmidt (Treyarch Global): On the competitive positioning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

[00:15:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the competitive positioning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around budget approval.

[00:17:00] David (Treyarch Global): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:19:00] Laura Schmidt (Treyarch Global): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about partner engagement. Can we address those?

[00:21:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the competitive positioning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around performance requirements.

[00:26:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the competitive positioning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

[00:28:00] Laura Schmidt (Treyarch Global): On the competitive positioning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

[00:31:00] Laura Schmidt (Treyarch Global): On the competitive positioning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.
